verses.1: A Psalm of David. Bless the LORD, my soul, And all that is within me, bless His holy name.
verses.2: Bless the LORD, my soul, And do not forget any of His benefits;
verses.3: Who pardons all your guilt, Who heals all your diseases;
verses.4: Who redeems your life from the pit, Who crowns you with favor and compassion;
verses.5: Who satisfies your years with good things, So that your youth is renewed like the eagle.
verses.6: The LORD performs righteous deeds And judgments for all who are oppressed.
verses.7: He made known His ways to Moses, His deeds to the sons of Israel.
verses.8: The LORD is compassionate and gracious, Slow to anger and abounding in mercy.
verses.9: He will not always contend with us, Nor will He keep His anger forever.
verses.10: He has not dealt with us according to our sins, Nor rewarded us according to our guilty deeds.
verses.11: For as high as the heavens are above the earth, So great is His mercy toward those who fear Him.
verses.12: As far as the east is from the west, So far has He removed our wrongdoings from us.
verses.13: Just as a father has compassion on his children, So the LORD has compassion on those who fear Him.
verses.14: For He Himself knows our form; He is mindful that we are nothing but dust.
verses.15: As for man, his days are like grass; Like a flower of the field, so he flourishes.
verses.16: When the wind has passed over it, it is no more, And its place no longer knows about it.
verses.17: But the mercy of the LORD is from everlasting to everlasting for those who fear Him, And His justice to the children’s children,
verses.18: To those who keep His covenant And remember His precepts, so as to do them.
verses.19: The LORD has established His throne in the heavens, And His sovereignty rules over all.
verses.20: Bless the LORD, you His angels, Mighty in strength, who perform His word, Obeying the voice of His word!
verses.21: Bless the LORD, all you His angels, You who serve Him, doing His will.
verses.22: Bless the LORD, all you works of His, In all places of His dominion; Bless the LORD, my soul!
